message: My costs are rising. I'll need higher offers to keep selling.
I'm patient and price-sensitive. Only buying if midpoint <=60. Set asks <=55 for quick trades; otherwise I wait.
Keeping max bid near 60. Ask 53-55 and we clear quickly, repeatedly. Higher asks risk no trade and me ratcheting bids down 1 each round. Early sales beat stalemate.
Understood. I'll aim for asks 56-58 to ensure steady trades. Keep your bids at 60 for mutual benefit and to avoid stalemates.
Dropping my bid to 56 this round. Ask 54-56 and we trade; ask 57+ and I move to 55 next round. Early low asks lock in steady sales; standoffs earn zero.
I will ask 56 this round. Please maintain your bid at 56 or higher to ensure continuous trades for both of us.
Only accepting midpoint <=55 now. My bid is 55 this round. Ask 53-55 to clear; ask 56+ and we skip this round and I move to 54 next. Early cooperation yields repeat sales.
I will ask 55. Please maintain your bid at 55 for future rounds to ensure continuous trades. Further reductions may lead to no deal.
I will ask 55 each round. Please bid 55 for steady trades. Lower bids risk no deal.
I'll bid 55 each round if your ask stays 55 or less. Raise to 56+ and I drop to 54 next round and keep ratcheting down. Maintain 55 for guaranteed trades through round 20.
I will ask 55 this round. Please maintain your bid at 55.
Keep ask 55 every round and I’ll bid 55, ensuring trades. If you ask 56 or higher, we don’t trade and I drop my bid to 54 for the duration. Stable 55 maximizes your sales and my commitment.
I will ask 55. Please bid 55 for continuous trades and mutual benefit.
Keep asking 55 and I’ll bid 55 every round through round 20, guaranteed trades. If you ask 56+, I drop to 54 for the rest of the game and we risk repeated no trades. 55 secures steady profit for
Keep asking 55 and I’ll keep bidding 55 every round. If you ask 56+, I immediately drop my bid to 54 for the rest of the game. Stable 55 guarantees you sales; deviations risk many zeroes.
I will ask 55. Let's maintain steady trades at 55 for mutual benefit.
I will ask 55. Let's maintain steady trades for mutual benefit.
I’ll bid 55 this round and every round while your ask stays 55. Ask 56+ and I permanently drop to 54. Stay at 55 for guaranteed trades.
Maintain ask 55 and I’ll keep bidding 55 every round. If you ask 56+ even once, I immediately drop my bid to 54 for the rest of the game. Stay at 55 for guaranteed trades and sure profit.
I will ask 55 to ensure continuous trades.
I will ask 55 this round to ensure continuous trades for mutual benefit.
Keep ask 55 and I’ll bid 55 every remaining round. Ask 56+ even once and I permanently drop to 54. Let’s lock in guaranteed trades.
Staying the course: I bid 55 every round through 20 if you ask 55. Ask 56+ even once and I drop to 54 for the rest. Nine rounds left; let’s lock guaranteed trades.
I will ask 55 to maintain steady trades and mutual benefit for the remaining rounds.
Keep ask 55 and I’ll bid 55 every remaining round. If you ask 56+ even once, I permanently drop to 54. If you ask 54, I’ll still bid 55—your choice.
I will ask 55 to ensure continuous trades for mutual benefit.
Keep ask 55 and I’ll bid 55 every remaining round. If you ask 56+ even once, I permanently drop to 54. We both lock in guaranteed trades and steady profit.
I will ask 55 to ensure continuous trades.
Ask 55 and I’ll bid 55 every remaining round—guaranteed trades. If you ask 56+ even once, I immediately drop to 54 for the rest. If you ask 54, I’ll still bid 55. Six rounds left; stay steady.
I will ask 55 to ensure continuous trades.
Stay at ask 55 and I’ll bid 55 in rounds 16–20. If you ask 56+ even once, I permanently drop to 54. Five rounds left—guaranteed trades at 55 if you stay steady.
I will ask 55 for the remaining rounds to ensure continuous trades.
Four rounds left. Keep ask 55 and I’ll bid 55 each remaining round—guaranteed trades. If you ask 56+ even once, I permanently drop to bid 54. If you ask 54, I’ll still bid 55—your choice.
I will ask 55 for the remaining rounds to ensure continuous trades.
I will ask 55 for the remaining rounds to ensure continuous trades.
Ask 54 for the remaining three rounds and I will bid 55 each time. Otherwise, keep 55 and I’ll bid 55. If you ever ask 56+, I permanently drop my bid to 50.
Ask 55 now and next round and I’ll bid 55. Ask 56+ once and I drop to 50. If you ask 54, I still bid 55.
I will ask 55 for the remaining rounds to ensure continuous trades.
I will ask 55 for this final round.
I will bid 55. Ask 55 (or 54) and we trade. Ask 56+ and there's no trade. Keep 55 to lock the sale.
